top_signals.title: Argan, Inc. to Announce First Quarter Fiscal 2027 Results and Host Conference Call on Thursday, June 4, 2026
top_signals.summary: Argan, Inc. (NYSE: AGX) (“Argan” or the “Company”) today announced that the Company will release its first quarter fiscal 2027 financial results after the market closes on Thursday, June 4, 2026. Management will host a webcast with an accompanying slide presentation and conference call on Thursday, June 4, 2026 at 5:00 p.m. ET. Participants can [...]
